name: Drawback on Distilled Spirits for Nonbeverage Products

eligibility.description: Available to manufacturers using tax-paid distilled spirits to produce nonbeverage products like extracts, medicines, or food items that meet the 'unfit for beverage purposes' standard.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can claim a refund (drawback) of excise taxes paid on distilled spirits used to manufacture medicines, food products, flavors, or perfumes that are unfit for beverage purposes.
